# ToolNames.DisplayName method

Resolves the display name to show for a tool, applying the §16.3 precedence: `title` → `annotations.title` → `name`. (R-16.3-i)

```csharp
public static string DisplayName(Tool tool)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| tool | The tool whose display name to resolve. |

## Return Value

The resolved display name.
